name: LifeWell Water Filter
description: LifeWell Water filter is a portable 10-L hollow fiber ultrafiltration unit.

taxonomy.sub_category: LifeWell Water Filter Updated on December 29, 2023 · Created on August 3, 2016 LifeWell Water Filter LifeWell Water filter is a portable 10-L hollow fiber ultrafiltration unit. Developed By RealRelief Tested By None Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description LifeWell is a water filter consisting of a 10-liter water bag and a detachable hollow fiber UF filter. It is capable of removing log 6 of all pathogens from untreated water i.e. 99.9999% removal which includes e. Coli, campylobacter, vibrio cholera, pseudomonas aeruginosa, shigella, and salmonella. It is mainly designed for use in developing countries and for disaster response. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Market Suggested Retail Price $12.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household, Public Sector Agencies, NGOs Distributors / Implementing Organizations The distributor for this product is Real Relief Way. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Sawyer Point ZeroTwo Water Purifier , Grifaid Family Filter , VF 100 Village Bucket Filter , Aqusafe Filters , Tapp™ Filter , WateROAM ROAMfilter Lite , and Sawyer PointOne Filter . Regions Worldwide Manufacturing/Building Method This product is mass-produced in China. Interview with representative Intellectural Property Type Select Type User Provision Model This product is manufactured in China and sold to wholesalers and NGOs around the world. Interview with representative Distributions to Date Status As of 2018, approximately 100,000 units have been distributed. Interview with representative Target use case Household use Manufacturer-specified flow rate (L/hr) 6 Bacteria reduction 6 log Type of membrane filtration Ultrafiltration Virus reduction Not tested Protozoa reduction Not tested Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction Unknown Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) Unknown Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) Not tested Material of construction It consists of a water bag (PVC sheet), a UF filter (Polysulfone), a carbon filter (GAC coconut 12×40 mesh) and a residue filter (Polypropylene). Safe water storage capacity (L) None Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) Between 500 and 2000 L, depending on turbidity. Design Specifications LifeWell water purifier is a point of use portable filter that weighs around 460 grams and consists of a water bag (PVC sheet), a UF filter (Polysulfone), a carbon filter (GAC coconut 12×40 mesh) and a residue filter (PP). The initial flow rate of the filter is 0.1 liters per min and the water bag capacity is 10 liters. Water is filled in a 10 Liter water bag with the facility of large built-in handles which allows easy handling. The detachable hollow fiber UF filter, (9 x 3 x 13) cm that weighs 0.4 kg is then used to purify the water approximately 1000 liters before replacement. Technical Support Technical support provided by the local distributors. Replacement Components None Lifecycle Depending on the turbidity of the water, the product can filter between 500 and 2000 L. The end of life is indicated when there is no more flow. Users can perform a backflush to extend the life of the filter. Interview with representative Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters This filter was designed to reduce bacteria by 99.9999%. Vetted Performance Status No third-party organizations, only testing performed by the designer. Safety No known safety hazards are related to this product. Complementary Technical Systems Safe water storage container for treated water. Academic Research and References R. Relief, “Lifewell water filter – user instruction video (English),” 07-Sep-2015. Available: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mG_i06eHSf0 “Goal 6,” Sdgs.un.org. Available: https://sdgs.un.org/goals/goal6 Compliance with regulations Unknown Evaluation methods The product is evaluated for removal of bacteria. Other Information User instruction video in English.
